github.description: GitHub API — repos, issues, PRs, code search

playwright.description: Browser automation for E2E testing and web scraping

filesystem.description: File system access for reading/writing project files

sequential-thinking.description: Step-by-step reasoning for complex problem solving

postgres.description: PostgreSQL read-only queries for database exploration

_notes.usage: Copy desired servers to your ~/.claude.json or project .mcp.json
_notes.important: Replace YOUR_*_HERE placeholders with actual values
_notes.context_warning: Each MCP server consumes context tokens. Keep under 10 servers and 80 tools active.
_notes.disable_per_project: Add 'disabledMcpServers' to project .claude/settings.json to disable unused servers
